title: update_index
description: Re-chunk and re-embed the listed notes, refresh BM25 entries, and reconcile graph links. Call after save_note succeeds, with the saved path(s). Idempotent: if a note's content_hash hasn't changed since the last index pass, the work is skipped automatically. Returns (not modeled here for v1) a summary {indexed: int, skipped: int, failed: [{path, error}]}.

items.description: Vault-relative path to a Markdown note that needs reindexing.

paths.description: Vault-relative paths to reindex. Pass exactly the notes whose content changed in this turn. Do not pass the whole vault — for full rebuilds, the user has a dedicated 'rebuild index' affordance in settings. Paths must be vault-relative and must not contain '..' segments.
